summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge recommendation is safe because no candidate has a complete merge preflight with resolved review-bot evidence and a passed Codex /review. No replacement fix artifact is concrete from the compacted artifact; the unresolved items are scoped to maintainer review, author follow-up, or broad-change judgment per PR.

actions.reason: Maintainer finalization decision is needed before merge; merge_candidate is blocked by missing merge preflight and missing Codex /review proof.
Active author follow-up plus failing checks and missing actionable review details make this a maintainer/author decision, not a merge or executable fix artifact.
Broad feature/config/docs delta with unresolved ClawSweeper issues requires maintainer judgment or a narrower follow-up split; not safe for merge_candidate or autonomous repair.
Looks like a plausible focused merge candidate after maintainer review, but current artifact lacks the required merge preflight and Codex /review evidence.
Large UI/session-state change needs maintainer review and complete merge preflight before any merge recommendation.
